top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Honeywell-Backed Quantinuum Raises $1.68 Billion in Upsized IPO
top_signals.summary: Quantinuum Inc., a quantum computing company backed by Honeywell International Inc., raised $1.68 billion in its upsized US initial public offering, demonstrating growing investor enthusiasm for the emerging technology.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Treasury Wine Flags Lower Earnings and Focus on Luxury Market
top_signals.summary: Australian vintner Treasury Wine Estates Ltd. is expecting lower earnings for the current financial year as it looks to focus on solidifying key markets and bolstering its position in the luxury portfolio.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: GOP Sen. Tillis slams Trump intelligence pick Pulte: 'Don't think he has a prayer'
top_signals.summary: Pulte is widely viewed as a Trump loyalist who has targeted the president's political foes during his tenure leading the housing regulatory agency.

top_signals.title: Historic stock rally faces key test
top_signals.summary: Two key tech companies reporting earnings after the bell could determine the next move higher or lower.
